categories.name: Condition
categories.description: Diagnosable diseases and disorders affecting the thyroid, hormones, metabolism, or endocrine system.

categories.name: Symptom
categories.description: Physical, cognitive, and emotional signs that patients experience — often the first clue that a hormonal issue is present.

categories.name: Medication
categories.description: Prescription medicines used to treat thyroid, hormone, metabolic, and weight-related conditions.

categories.name: Supplement
categories.description: Nutrients, botanicals, and functional-medicine staples commonly used to support thyroid and hormone health.

categories.name: Lab or Test
categories.description: Diagnostic lab panels, imaging, and functional tests used to evaluate thyroid and hormonal function.

categories.name: Procedure
categories.description: Clinical procedures and interventions — from biopsies to surgery — used in thyroid and endocrine care.

categories.name: Concept
categories.description: Key clinical and functional-medicine concepts that help patients understand how their body and care plan work.
